title: From The Ground Up
description: Highly configurable mod that revamps vanilla mobs
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640da65ec4dd351d2ebafc33e6d80380b5c1862f.png)

## About The mod
From The Ground Up is a mod that aims to revamp vanilla mobs from the ground up — giving them new sounds, visuals, mechanics and iterating on their original identity. 
Every new feature can be toggled on or off through the mod’s config.

## Grounded Resource Pack
The mod comes with a bundled resource pack that has additional tweaks that work in tandem with the mod's vision, but may feel out of place with other mods or with some config options disabled.

<details>
<summary>Feature list</summary>

- Endermen renamed to Warped
- Ender Pearl retextured and renamed to Warping Pearl
- Displacer retextured accordingly
- Retextured Creeper and Enderman to match the new designs (this change was made in case other mods utilize the base texture so they don't feel as out of place)
- Savage and Ravage creepie sprout retexture to fit with the new creeper
</details>


## Mob Changes


<details>
<summary>Enderman</summary>

- Remodel, Retexture, new Animations for idling, screaming, teleporting and running
- New Shattered variant that replaces spawns in the Overworld and 30% of spawns in a tag that by default only has the Warped Forest
- Shattered Enderman by default release a cloud of Dragon Breath upon death that can be bottled
- New sounds for everything
- New background sounds that play while fighting an Enderman
- New staring overlay when looking at an Enderman's face
- Higher chance of teleporting while fighting with one (even higher if Shattered)
- Removed ability to pick up and place blocks
- New chance of spawning holding different blocks (from a tag) that varies between dimensions
- New ambient particles and new teleporting effects
- New redstone block, the Displacer, that teleports blocks and entities in a set direction based on redstone input
- New Ender Pearl sounds


</details>



<details>
<summary>Creeper</summary>

- Remodel, Retexture, new Animations for exploding, running, being noticed
- New Lichen variant that spawns on stone
- Creeper now sneak up on you slowly before being noticed (being within your field of view), and run at you if you sprint
- Creeper explosions now don't break blocks, but cause blocks to fall in a radius. This only works with blocks in the `creeper_can_collapse` tag
- New sounds for everything
- New explosion particles for Creepers and Tnt
- New mob interactions with pigs and improved interaction with cats
- 9 new music discs can be dropped when killed by a skeleton
- Creeper explosions now ignite other Creepers
- Creepers now explode when on fire
- Powered Creepers are now immune to fire damage
- When exploding a Powered Creeper will spawn a new miniboss, the Charged Creeper
- Charged Creepers give a new effect called Doomed, that makes mobs drop their head on death
- Charged Creepers drop a new crop/projectile, Beheading Spores, which only grow during thunder and can be thrown at mobs to give them the Doomed effect


</details>
